jobs.purpose: Weekly refresh of the local GeoLite2-City.mmdb via the vendor's world:geoip command.
steps: Verify MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY is present in env; skip + log warning otherwise.
Compute new file size + hash + written path.
Fire MaxMindDatabaseRefreshed on success or dispatch DispatchMaxMindRefreshFailedNotification on failure.
jobs.notes: Runs Sunday 03:00 UTC via schedule.json. Also dispatched by DispatchRefreshMaxMindOnStale listener when the stale-probe fires mid-week.

jobs.purpose: Pre-populate the geography.cache Redis entries for the top-N most-hit list queries per locale + tenant.
steps: Fetch top-N (path + query + locale) tuples from cache-hit metrics.
For each: invoke the corresponding controller in-process (no HTTP round-trip) and stash the response bytes in Redis with the standard cache key.
